title: Fig. 3 in A revision of the genus Malus Mill. (Rosaceae)
author: Li, Jing-chao
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. Cluster analysis (UPGMA method) and PCA performed on all studied quantitative characters in Malus doumeri (Bois) A.Chev., M. melliana (Hand.-Mazz.) Rehder, and M. leiocalyca S.Z.Huang. The images come from the following specimens. M. doumeri: A00032498 (isotype of Pyrus melliana Hand.-Mazz.), CSFI033248, P00781055 (syntype), P00781056, P00781058 (lectotype of Pyrus laosensis Cardot), P03144755, P03144777, P03144789, PE00004596 (holotype of M. asiatica var. argutiserrata Hu & F.H.Chen), PE00927581, and QIN05067; M. melliana: P03144393, PE01460689, JXAU0004023, JXAU0004034, IBK00197341, and IBK00197343; M. leiocalyca: CSFI012166, CSFI012188, PE00952771, PE00952776, PE00952780 (paratype), PE00952781 (isotype), and IBK00367917.
steps_raw: Fig. 3. Cluster analysis (UPGMA method) and PCA performed on all studied quantitative characters in Malus doumeri (Bois) A.Chev., M. melliana (Hand.-Mazz.)
